case_title: A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC VS. JEFFREY BOWEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, JEFFREY DOES 1 TO 10 IN OCCUPANCY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT BY POSTING AND CERTIFIED MAIL; DECLARATION OF WILLIAM E. GALDAMEZ IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PLAINTIFF A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC SERVED MAY-16-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, JEFFREY
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, JEFFREY DOES 1 TO 10 IN OCCUPANCY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOWEN, JEFFREY DOES 1 TO 10 IN OCCUPANCY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 9TH STREET, UNIT #18 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 - COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BOWEN, JEFFREY DOES 1 TO 10 IN OCCUPANCY
NOTICE OF UNAVAILABILITY OF BURKHEAD, SHANNON F. ON MAY-24-2018 THROUGH MAY-29-2018 FILED BY PLAINTIFF A STAR HOLDINGS, LLC

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY ATTORNEY BURKHEAD, SHANNON F.
